title: Set up Lucia Auth v3 in a Next.js App Router project
summary: Full Lucia v3 setup — core + database adapter, session management, email/password + OAuth (GitHub/Google via Arctic), and protected routes with cookies.
declaration: I will set up Lucia Auth v3 for stateful session-based authentication. Lucia is a low-level session management library — it gives you full control over the auth logic with no magic. It stores sessions in your database (no JWTs by default). If you prefer Auth.js or Clerk (which handle more automatically), say so before I begin.
